metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5500
metadata.comment:
Rationale: An HA-SUMO2 knock-in mouse model was used to assess the synaptic localisation of SUMO2. SUMO2 was detected via the HA antibody and WT animals were used as negative control for each experiments (immunofluorescence, western blot).

SUMO2 localises at both the pre and post-synaptic compartments. "Quantitative analyses of anti-HA immunosignals confirmed a partial co-localization of Sumo2 with pre- and post-synaptic markers at excitatory and inhibitory synapses (Figure 3, Figure 4A, 3B, and and4A-4C).4A-4C)."

SUMO2 is ubiquitin-like modifier that covalently modifies lysine residues of target proteins.. Experimental description: anti-HA antibody was used as a HA_SUMO2 knock-in mouse line was studied
anti-SUMO2 antibody are bad and cannot distinguish between SUMO2 and another paralogue, SUMO3, which is almost identical.
